overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a character in a white cloak walking along a stone path through a fantasy landscape. The scene features a dramatic crimson storm sky, autumn-colored trees, distant castle ruins, and scattered stone structures. The character passes a fallen body before approaching a broken archway ruin.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy path toward distant castle ruins

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone path toward the castle ruins visible in the distance

entered.detail: large stone castle with multiple towers silhouetted against the red sky
cobblestone trail winding through the grass
trees with bright orange foliage dotting the landscape
tall stone cliff formation on the right side of the path
massive glowing golden tree visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a stone path through an open grassland with autumn-colored trees. In the distance, castle ruins stand against a dramatic crimson storm sky, while a rocky cliff face and glowing golden tree become visible on the right horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky hillside path with fallen body

events.description: a fallen body becomes visible on the right side of the stone path

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the path, approaching and passing a fallen figure lying on the ground

notable_agents.action: lying dead on the ground beside the stone path, wearing dark clothing

entered.detail: body of a fallen character lying on the grass beside the path

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, the rocky cliff face draws closer on the right, and a fallen corpse comes into view beside the path. The golden erdtree glows brightly in the mid-distance while the castle ruins remain visible ahead.

events.description: passing the fallen body and approaching the broken archway structure

agents.ego_description: walking toward the broken archway ruins with the castle still visible in the background

entered.detail: collapsed stone archway structure with broken pillars

segments.scene_description: The character passes the fallen body and approaches a broken stone archway ruin. The rocky cliff recedes behind while the golden erdtree fades into the distance, and the path leads directly toward the crumbling arch structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a stone path through an autumn landscape that gradually reveals a vast, dramatic horizon. It begins with a character in a white cloak walking through open grasslands dotted with orange-hued trees. As the camera advances, the view expands to reveal distant castle ruins silhouetted against a turbulent crimson storm sky. The scene then shifts focus toward the right horizon, where a rugged rocky cliff face and the ethereal glow of a golden tree emerge from the distance.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a stone path that shifts from a cliffside approach toward a crumbling architectural ruin. It begins with the camera tracking the character as a rocky cliff face draws closer on the right and a fallen corpse appears beside the path. As the character progresses past the body, the glowing golden Erdtree and distant castle ruins remain visible in the mid-distance. The scene then shifts as the rocky cliff recedes behind the viewer and the golden light of the Erdtree fades into the distance. Finally, the path opens up to lead the character directly toward a broken stone archway ruin.
